subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from the Youth unto His handmaiden, that she may render thanks unto her Lord and be among the devoutly obedient. Thus doth He command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدی الغلام الی امه من امائه لتشکر ربها و تکون من القانتات کذلک یامر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
